name: BlurFade
description: An entrance animation component that fades in content with a simultaneous blur-to-clear transition, creating an elegant reveal effect.
whenToUse: Use for page entrance animations, section reveals on scroll, or any content that should appear with a smooth blur-to-focus transition.

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay before animation starts in seconds

props.name: inView
props.description: Whether to trigger animation when in viewport
